Method of Making.comment: I believe that it basically is a collage of photos. The material balls might have been rendered in 3D.

Haptics.comment: I mainly observe a tactile sense here of the materials and the differences of imagining touching their surfaces. I don't think the other senses are really present.

visualChannels.comment: The combination of material and size show the weight.

contextualAttributes.comment:
The material balls are placed in a row next to each other.
Horizontal alignment: Position on physical ground from larger to smaller to facilitate comparison.

visualElements.comment: It provides a reference to the size of the spheres / amount of the materials.

contextualAttributes.comment: It's not only shape--it's the full image of the person that provides context.

visualElements.comment: It's an annotation with target the overall visualization and depicts how a turbine looks.
